scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(fs.existsSync('.vercel/output')) { fs.mkdirSync('../.vercel', {recursive:true}); fs.cpSync('.vercel/output', '../.vercel/output', {recursive:true}); console.log('Mirrored .vercel/output to root successfully!'); }"
